input.hiring_signal_brief: Hiring for Data Engineer; no funding or layoffs mentioned.

candidate_output: Most climate tech teams are already scaling their data pipelines with specialized engineers—you’re likely lagging behind. We can deploy a world-class engineer in under a week to fix your bottleneck. Let’s do a quick call?
